title: pelargonium drummondii
intro: Pelargonium drummondii, also known as South African Rose Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium drummondii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or essential oil, which can be used topically or internally, depending on the desired application.
